events.title: Paul McCartney turns 84
events.blurb: Sir Paul McCartney, the legendary co-founder of The Beatles, celebrates his 84th birthday today.

angles.name: Paul McCartney Birthday
angles.copy: Eighty-four years young today! Wishing a very happy birthday to the one and only Sir Paul McCartney. What's your favourite Macca track?

events.title: Alison Moyet turns 65
events.blurb: British singer-songwriter Alison Moyet, known for her powerful vocals and work with Yazoo, celebrates her 65th birthday today.

angles.name: Alison Moyet Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 65th birthday to the incredible Alison Moyet! Her voice is truly unmistakable. Which of her hits are you playing today?

events.title: Lionel Richie turns 77
events.blurb: American music icon Lionel Richie, known for his chart-topping hits and soulful voice, celebrates his 77th birthday today.

angles.name: Lionel Richie Birthday
angles.copy: Hello! Is it Lionel Richie's 77th birthday you're looking for? It is! Celebrate with us by turning up your favourite track.

events.title: Cyndi Lauper turns 73
events.blurb: Grammy-winning American singer Cyndi Lauper, famous for her distinctive style and hits like 'Girls Just Want to Have Fun', celebrates her 73rd birthday today.

angles.name: Cyndi Lauper Birthday
angles.copy: She's so unusual and celebrating her 73rd birthday today! Happy birthday to the one and only Cyndi Lauper.

events.title: George Michael would have been 63
events.blurb: Remembering the iconic British singer-songwriter George Michael, who would have turned 63 today.

angles.name: George Michael Tribute
angles.copy: A true legend of British music, George Michael would have been 63 today. His incredible voice and songwriting continue to resonate.

events.title: 17th Anniversary of Michael Jackson's Death
events.blurb: Today marks 17 years since the passing of the 'King of Pop', Michael Jackson, who died on June 25, 2009.

angles.name: Michael Jackson Death Anniversary
angles.copy: Seventeen years ago today, we lost the incomparable Michael Jackson. His music and artistry continue to inspire millions worldwide.

events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: The Beatles' legendary drummer, Ringo Starr, celebrates his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Ringo Starr Birthday
angles.copy: Peace and love! Happy 86th birthday to the one and only Ringo Starr. What's your favourite track featuring his iconic drumming?

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Sir Brian May, the iconic guitarist and songwriter for Queen, celebrates his 79th birthday today.

angles.name: Brian May Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the legendary Sir Brian May! His guitar riffs are truly out of this world. What's your favourite Queen anthem?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: Sir Mick Jagger, the charismatic frontman of The Rolling Stones, celebrates his 83rd birthday today.

angles.name: Mick Jagger Birthday
angles.copy: Still rolling at 83! Happy birthday to the one and only Sir Mick Jagger. What's your go-to Stones track?

events.title: MTV's 45th Anniversary
events.blurb: MTV, the groundbreaking music television channel, launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its first video.

angles.name: MTV Anniversary
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV launched and changed music forever! Remember seeing 'Video Killed The Radio Star' for the very first time?

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' released 32 years ago
events.blurb: Oasis released their iconic debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994, featuring anthems like 'Supersonic' and 'Live Forever'.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Anniversary
angles.copy: Still sounds as fresh as '94! We're celebrating Oasis' game-changing debut album, 'Definitely Maybe', today. What's your favourite track?

events.title: 57th Anniversary of Woodstock Festival
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal event in music history, took place from August 15-18, 1969, in Bethel, New York.

angles.name: Woodstock Anniversary
angles.copy: Peace, love, and music! Remembering the incredible legacy of the Woodstock Festival, which began 57 years ago today.

events.title: 49th Anniversary of Elvis Presley's Death
events.blurb: Today marks 49 years since the passing of the 'King of Rock and Roll', Elvis Presley, who died on August 16, 1977.

angles.name: Elvis Death Anniversary
angles.copy: Remembering the one and only King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, 49 years after his passing. His legacy lives on.

events.title: Remembering Tupac Shakur
events.blurb: Tupac Shakur, an influential figure in hip-hop, tragically passed away on September 13, 1996, at the age of 25.

angles.name: Tupac Remembrance
angles.copy: Remembering the profound impact of Tupac Shakur today, whose powerful lyrics and artistry continue to resonate.

events.title: Remembering Jimi Hendrix
events.blurb: Jimi Hendrix, a revolutionary guitarist who redefined rock music, passed away on September 18, 1970, at just 27 years old.

angles.name: Jimi Hendrix Remembrance
angles.copy: On this day, we pay tribute to the legendary Jimi Hendrix, whose electrifying guitar work remains unparalleled.

events.title: Celebrating The Beatles' 'Abbey Road'
events.blurb: The Beatles' iconic album 'Abbey Road' was released in the UK on September 26, 1969, featuring tracks like 'Come Together' and 'Here Comes the Sun'.

angles.name: Abbey Road Celebration
angles.copy: Get ready to cross that iconic zebra crossing! We're celebrating The Beatles' legendary 'Abbey Road' today, an album that changed music forever.

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: Chrissie Hynde, the formidable frontwoman of The Pretenders, celebrates her 75th birthday today.

angles.name: Chrissie Hynde Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! A true rock icon with a voice that still commands attention.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: British singer-songwriter Liam Gallagher, known as the former frontman of Oasis and Beady Eye, celebrates his 54th birthday today.

angles.name: Liam Gallagher Birthday
angles.copy: Our kid turns 54 today! Happy birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher. What's your favourite tune from the man himself?

events.title: Celebrating John Lennon's 'Imagine'
events.blurb: John Lennon's powerful anthem 'Imagine' was released as a single in the UK on October 24, 1975, becoming a timeless message of peace.

angles.name: Imagine Celebration
angles.copy: Imagine all the people... celebrating one of John Lennon's most timeless and poignant songs, 'Imagine', today.

events.title: Celebrating the Launch of the First iPod
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the revolutionary first-generation iPod on October 23, 2001, forever changing how we listen to music.

angles.name: iPod Launch Celebration
angles.copy: Remember when 1,000 songs fit in your pocket? Today, we're looking back at the launch of the original Apple iPod that changed everything.

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: October 5th marks James Bond Day, celebrating the release of the first James Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: James Bond Day
angles.copy: Shaken, not stirred. It's James Bond Day! Celebrating over six decades of 007's iconic style, gadgets, and unforgettable theme tunes.
